name: Executable Loaded from Temp Directory
notes: This rule triggers when an executable is loaded from a temp directory.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when any of ImageLoadedTempPath (custom) are contained in any of TempFilePath - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY Executable Loaded from Temp Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when any of ImageLoadedTempPath (custom) are contained in any of TempFilePath - AlphaNumeric
RED_list: Event name: Process Loaded Executable from Temp Directory
Event description: Process Loaded Executable from Temp Directory
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
